data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Crash On Trump's Tariff 'Liberation Day' — Analyst Says Buying BTC Between These Levels Could Lead To 'Substantial Gains'
data.description:
Leading cryptocurrencies pulled back Wednesday evening after President Donald Trump's “Liberation Day” tariff shock. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/04/44620222/bitcoin-ethereum-dogecoin-give-up-early-gains-on-trumps-tariff-liberation-day-analyst-flags-levels-where-buying-btc-could-result-in-substantial-gains?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: ‘National emergency’ as Trump’s tariffs dent crypto prices
data.description:
Crypto markets dipped after US President Donald Trump's declaration of a national emergency and sweeping tariffs on all countries as part of his latest salvo in the ongoing trade war.  The Trump administration has hit all countries with a 10% tariff starting April 5, with some countries facing even larger rates, such as China facing a 34% tariff, the European Union 20%, and Japan 24%.  During an April 2 speech in the Rose Garden at the White House, Trump said the US is charging countries “approximately half of what they are and have been charging us. ”🚨 @POTUS signs an Executive Order instituting reciprocal tariffs on countries throughout the world
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/national-emergency-trump-tariffs-dent-crypto-prices?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Justin Sun: "I am Ultraman", Techteryx is not part of his business, if TUSD cannot be redeemed, it may trigger a financial crisis
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen said in an exclusive interview with Sing Tao Daily that criminals used the reputation of Hong Kong's international financial center to defraud, hoping that the Hong Kong government would plug the loophole as soon as possible. At present, about 460 million US dollars (about 3.6 billion Hong Kong dollars) have been lent. Sun Yuchen added that Techteryx Ltd. sought assistance. When he first learned about the incident, he was very surprised and did not understand why large amounts of funds could be transferred overseas without the authorization of the principal. He explained that TUSD has 5 million users worldwide. Once it is discovered that TUSD cannot be exchanged for cash, it will trigger a big financial storm. Sun Yuchen also emphasized that Techteryx Ltd. does not belong to his industry, describing the incident as "Godzilla is coming", "Godzilla smashed all the buildings in the city, I am Ultraman (Superman) who beat Godzilla away with one palm, so I am a person who comes to save everyone." (Sing Tao Daily)

data.title: Shibarium Hits 1B Transactions as Shiba Inu Burn Rate Soars 10,000%
data.description:
The Shibarium blockchain has broken a huge milestone by clearing more than 1 billion overall transactions since going live. Per statistics from Shibariumscan, the Layer-2 network designed to enhance the Shiba Inu ecosystem has now processed 1. 006 billion transactions. This is a mark achieved within less than two years since its August 2023 launch
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/02/shibarium-hits-1b-transactions-as-shiba-inu-burn-rate-soars-10000/

data.title: Bitcoin volatility surges as Trump’s trade tariffs rattle markets
data.description:
3-4-2025 – Bitcoin valuations have undergone dramatic swings following the former American president’s latest protectionist measures targeting the automotive sector. The digital currency briefly touched $87,800 before settling at $85,500, as traders grappled with Donald Trump’s declaration of what he dubbed “Liberation Day”—marked by the introduction of a 25% levy on foreign-manufactured vehicles. data.title: Planet Morning News
Hong Kong Urged to Review Regulatory Mechanisms Amid Trust Fraud Concerns
data.description:
According to Odaily, a recent $500 million fraud case involving a trust institution has raised questions about Hong Kong's regulatory framework. Wu Jiezhuang, Chairman of the Legislative Council's Subcommittee on Web3 and Virtual Asset Development, emphasized that while Hong Kong is actively attracting foreign investment, including from mainland China, there is a significant misunderstanding of its systems among outsiders. This issue needs to be addressed promptly.

Wu noted that the incident is likely to draw international attention, necessitating a swift review of the relevant regulatory mechanisms to address public concerns. Currently, Hong Kong lacks a dedicated asset custody regulatory system, and some Web3 companies use trust companies as third-party asset custodians. While following proper procedures poses no issues, exploitation of regulatory gaps by criminals could undermine confidence in Hong Kong as a financial hub.

He suggested increasing efforts in public education and reviewing the system for potential improvements to prevent similar incidents in the future.

data.title: South African Tax Authority Mandates Registration for Crypto Transactions
data.description: According to Odaily, South African Revenue Service Commissioner Edward Kieswetter has announced that all taxpayers, exchanges, and intermediaries involved in cryptocurrency transactions must register with the tax authorities. Failure to do so will be considered illegal. Kieswetter emphasized that registration will enable the tax department to monitor business activities and enhance regulatory oversight of the crypto industry.

data.title: Hong Kong legislators respond to the US$500 million fraud case involving a trust institution: the outside world may have misunderstandings about the Hong Kong system
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In response to a trust institution being involved in a $500 million fraud case and raising questions about the Hong Kong system, Wu Jiezhuang, chairman of the Hong Kong Legislative Council's Web3 and Virtual Asset Development Subcommittee, said that Hong Kong is actively attracting foreign investment, including from the mainland, but many outsiders have limited understanding of Hong Kong's system and even misunderstandings, which is a problem that needs to be faced.
Wu Jiezhuang pointed out that the incident is expected to attract international attention and the relevant regulatory mechanism must be reviewed as soon as possible to respond to social concerns. At present, Hong Kong has not yet established a special asset custody regulatory system. Some Web3 companies will use trust companies as a means of third-party custody of assets. If they follow the formal process, there is no problem, but if the system is used by criminals, it may affect the outside world's confidence in Hong Kong's financial center.
He suggested that publicity and education should be strengthened, and whether the system has room for optimization should be reviewed to prevent similar incidents from happening again.
